_comment: CR 8.1 frozen real-map fixture for the reported top-left bridge in
mask_20250604_135955.png. CR 8.1 freezes the mask, the region of interest,
and the exact typed-topology invariants below. The concrete passage document
(centreline points + width matching the coach placement) and the live
assertions against real builder output are CR 8.2 (build) and CR 8.5 (human
map review). Do NOT fabricate centreline coordinates here — they must come
from the editor-authored File.level_passages once CR 8.2 wires the builder to
the canonical document. Until then passage_document is null.

region_of_interest.note: Top-left quadrant; the bridge crosses the diagonal grey band.

frozen_invariants: one continuous typed passage chain endpoint-to-endpoint over the bridge
base connectivity beneath the bridge (a genuine transverse underpass remains)
no base/passage turn at the projected crossing (base walk never enters a passage node)
transitions only at the two saved passage endpoint nodes
every intermediate passage node has same-passage degree two
no generic k-NN / skeleton / witness / repair edge touches an intermediate passage node
no cross-passage edge; overlapping passages stay independent
region legality preserved for every typed leg
consumed_by: CR 8.2 acceptance (real builder output on this mask)
CR 8.5 rollout gate (manual map review, both directions)
